title: AFT Reports
body_text:
AFT Reports
1	Introduction to AFT Reports
1.1	Accessing AFT Reports
AFT reports are available from Central 1 as described below. See the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part for more information on the FTP Service.
MERG File
Financial institutions download the MERG file from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File and Report Exchange. The MERG file is usually available the following business day and contains all applicable AFT reports. It is the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs root directory.
If applicable, PDFs of the AFT reports are available in the AFT folder. Go to the ГўВҖВңCADГўВҖВқ subfolder to access Canadian dollar reports or the ГўВҖВңUSDГўВҖВқ subfolder to access US dollar reports.
CRF* and ICR1 Files (CAD AFT Report Files)
As an alternative, financial institutions can download the CRF* and ICR1 report files from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File and Report Exchange. The CRF* and ICR1 files are available after each run of the CAD AFT clearing files.
The CRF* and ICR1 files provide specific AFT reports in advance of the same AFT reports that are available in the MERG file (which, in some cases, is available the following day). This allows the financial institution to have prior access to AFT clearing reports that consistently correspond to the AFT clearing files received for the same day.
The CRF* and ICR1 files are in the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs root directory. If applicable, PDFs of the CRF* and ICR1 AFT clearing reports are available in the AFT ГўВҖВңCADГўВҖВқ subfolder and have a timestamp added to the pdf filename to differentiate the advance AFT reports from existing AFT reports.
The reports from the CRF* and ICR1 files will be purged from Central 1ГўВҖВҷs File and Report Exchange after seven calendar days, since these are advance versions of existing AFT clearing reports. Financial institutions can continue to use the MERG file for archival purposes.
Filename
Contents
PDF Filename
CRF*
Automated Transfer System Detailed Listing (CCD) ГўВҖВ“ Lists details of incoming Canadian AFT transactions by Settlement Date and by Run and can be used for tracing or verification
CCD_yyyymmdd_hhmm.pdf
Summary of Automated Transfer System (CCS) ГўВҖВ“ Lists the settlement totals for incoming Canadian AFT transactions by Settlement Date and by Run
CCS_yyyymmdd_hhmm.pdf
Business Pre-authorized Debits ГўВҖВ“ AFT (PADB) ГўВҖВ“ Lists the details of incoming electronic Canadian AFT business PADs
PADB_yyyymmdd_hhmm.pdf
ICR1
Consolidated Returns, Recalls, Rejects and Error Corrections (ICRR) ГўВҖВ“ Lists Canadian AFT exception transactions that are returned, recalled, rejected, and/or error corrected
ICRR_yyyymmdd_hhmm.pdf
*Indicates the run number (e.g., CRF1, CRF2, CRF3, CRF4)
The AIBC/AIBU (for BC financial institutions) is in the root directory. The AIOC/AIOU (for Ontario financial institutions) is available in the ONDL file that is in the root directory. If applicable, PDFs of these reports are available in the Banking folder. See the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part for more information on accessing the File and Report Exchange.
Business members who input their own AFT Transactions on
PaymentStream
AFT or upload AFT files to
PaymentStream
AFT retrieve AFT reports via
PaymentStream
AFT.
If the financial institution inputs data on behalf of a business member, arrangements are made during set-up for the distribution of any reports that the client requires.
Related Information
Current Account Services (CAS) Online Part
File Exchange and Report Distribution Part
Originating AFT via PaymentStream AFT Part
1.2	Summary of Central 1 AFT Reports by Transaction Type
The tables below describe the main Central 1 AFT report(s) by transaction type.
AFT Transactions Originated by the Financial Institution or Business Member
Description
Report Name/Code
Comments
Accepted AFT Transaction
Settlement Register
ICSR/UCSR
Specifies the net amount posted to the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 account for outgoing AFT files and for returns by branch.
Summary of data received from AFT System ГўВҖВ“ ICRM/UCRM
Lists transactions in an outgoing AFT file by Originator ID and File Creation Number.
Item Trace Report ГўВҖВ“ Incoming Items ГўВҖВ“ ICTI/UCTI
Lists outgoing individual AFT Transactions and, if applicable, the OriginatorГўВҖВҷs offsetting entries.
Daily AFT Clearing Settlement ГўВҖВ“ AFT Originating ГўВҖВ“ ICPS/UCPS
Displays the settlement to current accounts and provides financial institutions with a summary of transactions created by Originator IDГўВҖВҷs. It can be used by financial institutions to map posting activities and reconcile current accounts.
Recalled AFT Transaction
Consolidated Returns, Recalls, Rejects, and Error Corrections ГўВҖВ“ ICRR/UCRR
Recalls refer to transactions created by a financial institution or business member Originator that were sent in error but have not yet been posted to the recipientsГўВҖВҷ accounts. This report lists successfully recalled transactions.
Rejected AFT Transaction
Settlement Register ГўВҖВ“ ICSR/UCSR
Specifies which party, Central 1 or the Receiving Financial Institution, rejected an outgoing AFT transaction.
Consolidated Returns, Recalls, Rejects, and Error Corrections ГўВҖВ“ ICRR/UCRR
Lists outgoing AFT Transactions rejected by Central 1 or the receiving data centre.
Possible account number errors
Transaction Account Warning List ГўВҖВ“ ICRW/UCRW
Lists the transactions received from the AFT Originator that may contain an error in the destination account number. If the account number validation is the only error, the transaction will be sent, and a warning message will go back to the AFT Originator.
Returned AFT Transaction (returned by financial institution)
Batch Returns User List ГўВҖВ“ ICBR/UCBR
Lists transactions returned by the financial institution via ORS or the Batch Return Service, by branch.
Settlement Register ГўВҖВ“ ICSR/UCSR
Lists, by Originator ID and branch, the total number and value of transactions returned via ORS or the Batch Return Service and the net value.
Batch Returns User Summary List ГўВҖВ“ ICBS/UCBS
Provides one-line summary of AFT returns by Originator ID. Multiple branches can appear on each page.
Summary of Data Received from AFT System ГўВҖВ“ ICRM/UCRM
Lists transactions returned by the financial institution via ORS or the Batch Return Service, by Originator ID and File Creation Number.
Daily AFT Clearing Settlement ГўВҖВ“ AFT Returns ГўВҖВ“ ICPS/UCPS
Provides the financial institution with a breakdown of its returns. It is sorted by Originator ID with debit and credit totals and a net total.
Item Trace Report ГўВҖВ“ Incoming Items ГўВҖВ“ ICTI/UCTI
Lists transactions returned by the financial institution via ORS or the Batch Return Service. This report is available for returned AFT transactions upon request. Note that regular outgoing AFT transactions (i.e., non-returns) are listed on a separate ICTI/UCTI report.
Rejected AFT Returns
Batch Returns Error List ГўВҖВ“ ICBE/UCBE
Provides a one-line summary of each transaction that is rejected from the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs submitted AFT returns.
Error Correction (file reversed)
Summary of Reversed Error Corrections Report ГўВҖВ“ ICSE/UCSE
Lists total item count and dollar value of an Error Correction requested by a financial institution or business member Originator.
Transaction Error Correction
Consolidated Returns, Recalls, Rejects, and Error Corrections ГўВҖВ“ ICRR/UCRR
Lists Transaction Error Corrections. Error Corrections appear on this report because they are currently processed as Trace and Return requests.
Re-presented AFT Transaction
Summary of Data Delivered from Auto Re-presentment - ICDN/UCDN
Lists AFT re-presented debits and the offsetting credit transactions that are automatically created for the AFT Re-presentment Originator.
Notice of Change (NOC) Transactions
NOC ГўВҖВ“ Originated by Credit Union ГўВҖВ“ NCOC/NUOC
Lists NOC transactions created by the financial institution.
AFT Transactions Received by the Financial Institution
Description
Report Name/Code
Comments
Incoming AFT Transaction
Automated Transfer System Detailed Listing ГўВҖВ“ CCD/UCD
Lists AFT Transactions created by another financial institution for credit/debit to a financial institution member. These are reported as C or D records.
Daily AFT Clearing Settlement ГўВҖВ“ AFT Credit Clearing ГўВҖВ“ ICPS/UCPS
Provides a summary from individual CCD Reports corresponding to each run (BC ГўВҖВ“ CR01, CR02, CR03, and CR04; Ontario ГўВҖВ“ ON01, ON02, ON03, ON04, and ONRT) posted to financial institutions on business days.
Error Correction Transaction
Automated Transfer System Detailed Listing ГўВҖВ“ CCD/UCD
Lists Error Corrections initiated by another financial institution. These are reported as E or F records.
Returned Transaction (returned by another financial institution)
Consolidated Returns, Recalls, Rejects, and Error Corrections ГўВҖВ“ ICRR/UCRR
Lists transactions originally created by the financial institution or business member Originator that were returned by the destination financial institution.
Automated Transfer System Detailed Listing ГўВҖВ“ CCD/UCD
Lists transactions originally created by the financial institution or business member Originator that were returned by the destination financial institution. These are reported as I or J records.
Business PAD Transaction
Business Pre-authorized Debits ГўВҖВ“ AFT ГўВҖВ“ PADB/UADB
Lists incoming electronic Business PADs by branch.
Notice of Change (NOC) Transaction
Notice of Change (AFT) Detailed Listing ГўВҖВ“ NCDL/NUDL
Lists notice of change transactions from other financial institutions. These are for outgoing AFT transactions created by the financial institution or business member originator that contained incorrect account/routing information.
